intro.title: Certifications & Compliance
intro.description: Compliance is part of your brand promise. The right labeling and documentation pathway protects your listings and builds confidence.

cards.label: CE
cards.title: CE Marking Readiness (EU)
cards.description: We support documentation planning and labeling preparation based on your product type and destination market. Manufacturers must indicate conformity with applicable EU rules.

cards.label: RoHS
cards.title: RoHS Compliance
cards.description: For electrical equipment, we align materials and documentation pathways to support RoHS compliance expectations regarding hazardous substances.

cards.label: FCC
cards.title: FCC Authorization (U.S.)
cards.description: FCC recognizes pathways such as Certification and SDoC. Tell us your product configuration and we will suggest a practical next step.

cards.label: ISO
cards.title: ISO 9001 (Optional)
cards.description: If your sourcing process requires QMS documentation (like ISO 9001), tell us what your vendor onboarding needs include.

callout.title: Tell us your configuration
callout.description: Share your product type and target market and we will suggest a practical next step for testing and documentation planning.

primary.title: Request a Compliance Checklist
primary.description: Tell us your target market, quantity, and customization needs. We respond within 24 hours with a practical checklist and next steps.

secondary.title: Request Samples
secondary.description: Verify fit, finish, and performance before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
